basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Tirunelveli District Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission (TNSRLM Tirunelveli) District Technical Assistant (Farm) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tirunelveli.nic.in. A total of 1 District Technical Assistant (Farm) vacancy has been announced through the TNSRLM Tirunelveli District Technical Assistant (Farm) Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Tirunelveli District Technical Assistant (Farm) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TNSRLM Tirunelveli District Technical Assistant (Farm) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Tirunelveli recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the TNSRLM Tirunelveli District Technical Assistant (Farm) recruitment is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the District Technical Assistant (Farm) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc Agriculture degree to be eligible for the District Technical Assistant (Farm) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the District Technical Assistant (Farm) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the District Technical Assistant (Farm) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the District Technical Assistant (Farm) post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission (TNSRLM Tirunelveli).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is A1/822/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be found through the links provided in the Important Links section of this article.
